title: Google announces Gemini 3.6 Flash and cybersecurity AI, teases 3.5 Pro and Gemini 4
summary: It has also released Gemini 3.5 Flash Lite and 3.5 Flash Cyber. Likewise, Gemini 3.5 Flash Lite is available to developers and in the Gemini app.
